commercialRule: Inventra updates internally; users do not open GitHub, JSON, or choose files.
releaseNotes: Fixed future installer dental icon lock verification newline bug.
Locked the official dental logo as the installer icon source for all future Inventra installer builds.
Added icon hash verification before building the installer so the wrong/default Electron icon is not reused.
Future downloaded installers built from this release use the dental logo for the desktop shortcut, Start Menu, installer, app window, and favicon.
No products, suppliers, orders, reports, updater data, SQL, or app data are changed.
